Naltron's Mark  

Description

3: Increase Max Hitpoints by 931 (L58) to 912 (L49)
4: Increase HP when cast by 931 (L58) to 912 (L49)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 500 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any AE Range: 100
Fizzle Adj: 5 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Group v1
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: The mark of Naltron flashes before your eyes.
Cast on other: Soandso is covered in mystic symbols.
Effect Fades: The mystic symbol fades.

Game Description

Covers your group in a shimmer of holy runes, increasing their hit points for 1 hour(s) 12.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Naltron's Mark

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Naltron's Mark
ClassLevel
CLR58
Expansion:

Duration:
1 hour(s) 12.0 mins
  • Comments (17)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (8)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Vicar Delin - 102pp 2gp 7sp 2cp
Post Comment
Agnarr
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2018 at 1:36 AM Rating: Good
Senbian
Scholar
18 posts
This spell gave 525 hitpoints @58 compared to Symbol of Marzin which gave 680 hitpoints on Agnarr.

I guess because its a group version it gives less?
▲ Page top
Agnarr
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2018 at 2:03 AM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
Senbian wrote:
This spell gave 525 hitpoints @58 compared to Symbol of Marzin which gave 680 hitpoints on Agnarr.

I guess because its a group version it gives less?


The spell data has the correct info which has a max value of 525. Our spell parser just isn't parsing it correctly. I'll take a look at the code for it.
____________________________
Allakhazam Developer and Admin

Spell drop:Old Sebilis Sebilite Juggernaut
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2014 at 3:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1706487388669
Scholar
26 posts
This spell drops in Old Sebilis off the Sebilite Juggernaut's. Please update this ZAM.
▲ Page top
Good spell
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2006 at 10:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591909889591
1 post
I use this spell all the time. Its nice to be able to cast Heroic Bond, group symbol and then be done. Not a huge HP diffrence between naltron and marzin so for 90% of regular grouping its fine. If buffing for a good named mob or raid I'll make sure to use big symbol. Paid 400pp on sleeper , but much but its a rarer spell.
▲ Page top
another spell to skip
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2004 at 1:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763806772
346 posts
lvl58 is a bit late for a group version of lvl44symbol, why would you use this over symbol of marzin? even if you dont have mana, just med and single target everybody, better then lvl44 symbol.

they should remove this, and put group marzin at this lvl, instead of at lvl of aego, where you wouldnt use it...
▲ Page top
No Reagent Cost
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2004 at 8:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791337575
View User Forum
Scholar
27 posts
As of the September 13, 2004 patch this spell no longer costs a peridot to cast. Clerics rejoice.

Elvanaria Blueleaf
Divine Servant of Tunare
(Kane Bayle Server)
▲ Page top
not used alot
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 4:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786302754
83 posts
this spell isn't used alot at this level. it's very rarely used.
▲ Page top
does this stack ???
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787516081
9 posts
Does this spell stack with Symbol of Marzin(lvl 54 cleric spell)? My guess is that it must since Marzin is a lower level spell and is listed as having more hp than this one. Does anyone know for sure?
▲ Page top
RE: does this stack ???
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 9:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787516081
9 posts
Nevermind. I just noticed this is a group buff not a single target buff like marzin. For the cleric on a budget I guess.
▲ Page top
RE: does this stack ???
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 1:08 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
There is a group version of the symbol of marzin as well.

I bought this spell, just to have a full spell book, but NEVER ONCE used it. Its a waste of money to get. Typically, most grind groups prefer Temperance to the combo of this plus the AC/HP buff and AC buff. Plus you get Aego and BOA at 60, which make this even more useless.

The only time I ever use symbol is on casters who have Protection of the Cabbage/grove/nine, for the mana regen. That will never be everyone in the group.
▲ Page top
sol ro

# Nov 23 2003 at 8:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258122759
22 posts
is it worth it to buy
